items.title: Minerals Must Benefit Countries, Communities, Not Finance Criminals, Conflict, Security Council Hears during Day-Long Debate on Natural-Resources Governance
items.summary: Countries and communities, especially in resource-rich Africa, must benefit most from the minerals in their own backyards, speakers affirmed today at a Security Council debate on “Natural resources governance: the foundation of peace, security and prosperity”.

items.title: United Nations Board of Auditors Holds Eightieth Regular Session, 21-22 July at UN Headquarters, New York
items.summary: The General Assembly established the United Nations Board of Auditors in 1946 as an important mechanism to promote accountability and transparency in the United Nations.
